calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction And Order To Establish Ownership Of Real Property; Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Roberts, via CourtCall, for Blanch Glenchur, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the issue regarding the request to transfer title. Counsel offers testimony regarding his position and points the court to his points and authorities for additional advocacy.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Instruction and Order, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported.
